name: shell renderer JS bundle (gz) — per docs/shell/13-frontend-stack.md performance budgets; bumped 270→290 KB on 2026-05-28 for 12.1 (FormatJS ICU runtime, ~12.6 KB); 290→292 KB on 2026-06-01 for the new-vault onboarding pass (welcome redesign + Join/Devices first-run entry + theme-provider rework, 282.6→290.5 KB gz); 292→350 KB on 2026-06-01 for 8.8 (@react-fancy-menus/core menu runtime swap-in, +~52 KB for the menu runtime + @floating-ui/react-dom + @dnd-kit/* — dnd-kit is the bulk and only pulled for sortable rows no current surface uses; revisit if the dep ships a sortable-free entry). Replaces the bespoke cheatsheet/launcher/icon-context/anchored-menu DOM that was deleted

shell main process bundle (raw) — bumped 100→110 KB on 2026-05-23 for 10.2 (HPKE + member-wraps + device-x25519) + 10.3a (sync envelope codec/seal/pipeline/relay-port) + help/changelog + defaults-catalog scheme/extension expansion; bumped 110→210 KB on 2026-06-11 — the limit drifted ~86 KB under-budget across the sync stack (10.3b–10.9) + 9.12.3 (ListSource service-side resolution moved the predicate/source evaluators into main) + Mailbox-5 (the `mail` service + Gmail transport glue), measured 196 KB raw. This is a deliberate re-baseline, NOT a fix: a dedicated main-process trim pass is owed at G3 (split workers out / lazy-load the sync + connector subsystems). Revisit there. Bumped 210→214 KB for the Files storage-inventory surface (storage-inventory + gather + wallpaper-entries + the files.listStorageInventory wire, ~2.8 KB); folds into the same G3 trim. Bumped 214→220 KB on 2026-06-14 for the Storage-view owner-stamping surface (listAssetOwners + ownerByAsset entityId/entityType stamping so Storage rows open in Preview), measured 218.1 KB raw; same G3 trim. Bumped 220→245 KB on 2026-06-16 for the IE-1/IE-2 import-export spine (`packages/shell/src/main/{bundle,import}/` — tar/container codec, canonical-json, vault export/import + the shared import engine), measured 238.9 KB raw; same G3 trim (the import/export subsystem is a lazy-load candidate alongside sync + connectors). Bumped 245→305 KB on 2026-06-23 — accumulated drift across the always-on sync stack (10.12 live-sync engine, 10.13 selective-sync, 10.14 restore producer+consumer + RestoreEngine), the app-lifecycle catalog spine (14.29–14.34: CatalogClient / InstallEngine / UpdateEngine / `.brainstorm` bundle codec), SYNC-4b gated admission, and the cross-app DnD broker services (selection / dnd / ghost overlay), measured 296.5 KB; NOT a fix — the same G3 main-process trim is owed (sync + connector + import-export + catalog are all lazy-load candidates).
app preload bundle (raw) — runs in every app renderer
